hook: This is what premium brand-controlled creative actually looks like.
script: Open with the strongest premium visual frame immediately.
Show the product and brand feel with clean focal composition.
Reinforce premium quality and visual trust in one sentence.
End with a direct CTA for discovery or shopping.
caption: Premium visual launch built with strict brand control.

intelligence.trend_direction: Prioritize high-contrast first-frame impact, fast hook delivery, and visually clean premium presentation.
intelligence.competitor_gap: Avoid generic noisy edits. Focus on cleaner product-led luxury execution and stronger credibility cues.
intelligence.audience_fit: Target short-attention users who respond to fast visual payoff, clarity, and premium product framing.
intelligence.algorithm_fit: Optimize for first seconds retention, concise structure, and direct visual storytelling.

compliance_notes: Use the image as creative reference only for short-form video production.
Keep key creative elements inside safe zones.
Avoid relying on clickable links, @ mentions, or hashtag behavior inside ad caption logic.
Do not make misleading or non-verifiable claims.
